name: Gingered Stir Fry Vegetable Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 1 Eight ounce can of vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes and 1/4 teaspoon salt in a medium-sized saucepan with enough water to cover. Simmer for 10 minutes or until tender.
2. Add the snow peas and cook for an additional 2 minutes. Drain in a colander.
3. Meanwhile, slice the zucchini, leek, fennel, celery, and carrot into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large nonstick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add the vegetables; stir-fry for 6 minutes.
6. Add the ginger and garlic; cook for an additional minute.
7. Add the potatoes, snow peas, broth, Pernod, saffron. Season with salt. Simmer for 2 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
